summary: Tested complete comment system with notification triggers. All backend APIs pass (13/13). Frontend UI fully functional: comment sections on content cards, expand/collapse toggle, add comment form, comments list display, and notification bell showing new_comment type with amber icon.

issues: WebSocket 'closed before connection established' warning in console on navigation - expected browser behavior

backend_api_tests.test: Notification created for cross-user comment (type: new_comment)
No notification for self-comment on own content
Comment count increments on content stats

frontend_tests.test: new_comment notifications with amber icon in dropdown
Content Management page loads with 8 items
Comment section on each content card (data-testid='comment-section')
Time ago display on comments (e.g., '5m ago')
Notifications page shows new_comment type items

comment_endpoints.add_comment: POST /api/user-content/{content_id}/comments - Requires auth, validates content exists
comment_endpoints.delete_comment: DELETE /api/user-content/comments/{comment_id} - Owner or content owner can delete

notification_triggers.cross_user_comment: When user A comments on user B's content, user B receives notification
notification_triggers.self_comment: No notification when user comments on their own content

comment_ui.location: Bottom of each content card on Content Management page
comment_ui.toggle_button: Shows comment count, expands/collapses comments panel

seed_data_creation: Created test comments during pytest. Existing comment from CVE Admin on TEST_Updated_Title content.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Comment system fully working. Comment endpoints: add (POST), list (GET), delete (DELETE) on /api/user-content/{id}/comments and /api/user-content/comments/{id}. Notifications auto-created for cross-user comments (type=new_comment, amber icon). Self-comments don't trigger notifications. Frontend shows comment section on each content card with expand/collapse, add form, and list with author/text/time.
